creator: freebsd-ports@charlieroot.de
text:
These versions are maintenance releases and contain bug fixes only.

These versions add PHP 8.3 support for TYPO3 Core.

For details about the releases, please see:

https://get.typo3.org/release-notes/12.4.6

or our news https://typo3.org/article/typo3-1246-and-11531-maintenance-releases-published
